name: applILTxRequestConsumed
title: applILTxRequestConsumed
description: After the IL clamp 15 state (for ASR PDU IL Ignition state) has been enabled by ILActivateClamp15 (for ASR PDU IL ARILSetIgnitionState) or any wake-up-allowed signal is transmitted, then optionally this functions is called. Within this function the bus NM sleep timer should be restarted.
